cases.description: Dead code removal triggers the skill with safety analysis
cases.prompt: remove all unused exports from the utils module
expectations: Checks git history or tests to verify each export is truly unused
Lists all code to be deleted before deleting
Runs tests after deletion to verify nothing breaks
Does NOT delete code that has callers in another file without verification

cases.description: Duplicate code consolidation with safety checks
cases.prompt: there are three copies of the same validation logic in different files. consolidate them
expectations: Identifies all instances of the duplicated logic
Creates a shared function before removing duplicates
Runs tests after each removal step
Does NOT remove a copy until the shared function is confirmed working

cases.description: Complex code simplification without behavior change
cases.prompt: the processOrder function has cyclomatic complexity of 15. simplify it
expectations: Runs tests before making any changes to establish baseline
Runs tests after each refactor step
Does NOT add new features while simplifying

cases.prompt: /codi-refactoring clean up the legacy payment code
expectations: Identifies what to clean up before making changes
Verifies behavior is preserved after changes

cases.description: Adding new functionality should NOT trigger refactoring skill
cases.prompt: add dark mode support to the settings page
expectations: Does NOT invoke the refactoring skill
Does NOT remove existing code without adding the feature first

cases.description: Reviewing code quality should trigger code-review, not refactoring
cases.prompt: review the auth module for any issues
expectations: Does NOT invoke the refactoring skill
Does NOT make code changes during a review
